title: What Happens When You Capture the ISS?

scenes.text: An extraordinary moment: catching the ISS transit across the sun!
Short-lived, this event lasts mere seconds as the ISS moves swiftly in orbit.
Photographers have only a brief window to capture this celestial moment.
Every capture is a reminder of our place in the universe.
scenes.label: A MOMENT IN TIME

scenes.text: Follow for a new science fact every day.

description: Capturing the ISS is a fleeting yet powerful reminder of our achievements in space. Follow for daily science!
